summary: Tested Call Support Dashboard new features: All Tickets tab (shows ALL tickets across departments), Global Search (by phone/email), Customer History panel in ticket details. All 9 features tested and working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility warning, non-blocking

context_for_next_testing_agent: Call Support Dashboard has 5 tabs: Ticket Queue, Working, All Tickets, Search, Feedback Calls. All Tickets tab shows 100 tickets from all departments with status filter. Search tab allows global search by phone/email/serial/order_id. Ticket details dialog shows Customer History panel with related tickets, warranties, and dispatches.

call_support_login.details: Call Support user (callsupport@musclegrid.in) can login successfully and access dashboard

all_tickets_tab_visibility.details: All Tickets tab shows 100 tickets from ALL departments (not just call support queue). Shows tickets with various statuses including hardware_service, repair_completed, new_request, etc.

status_filter_on_all_tickets.details: Status filter dropdown works correctly. Tested filters: All Statuses, Open, In Progress, Hardware Service, Repair Completed, Resolved, Closed

global_search_by_phone.details: Search tab allows searching by phone number. Returns tickets, warranties, and dispatches counts with detailed results

global_search_by_email.details: Search tab allows searching by email. Returns matching customer records across tickets, warranties, and dispatches

search_results_display.details: Search results show summary cards (Tickets Found, Warranties, Dispatches) with counts and detailed tables for each category

ticket_details_customer_history.details: Ticket details dialog shows Customer History panel on the right side with customer info, related tickets, warranties, and dispatches

customer_history_shows_related_data.details: Customer History panel shows: Previous Tickets section, Warranties section (with warranty number, device type, status), Dispatches section

history_button_on_all_tickets.details: History button on each ticket row in All Tickets tab opens ticket details with customer history panel pre-loaded
